parameters.content:
CHUNK_SIZE
Defines the size of each text chunk before embedding.
ie: 1000

CHUNK_OVERLAP
Sets how much text overlaps between adjacent chunks.
ie: 200

dimensions
Specifies the dimensional size of the embeddings stored in Pinecone.
ie: 768

dense_model
Embedding model used for dense vector generation.
ie: llama-text-embed-v2

sparse_model
Embedding model used for sparse vector generation
ie: pinecone-sparse-english-v0

pinecone_host
The Pinecone index host where vectors are stored.
https://YOURHOST.pinecone.io

namespace
Defines the namespace within the index for logical data separation.
ie: demo

## Upsert
Uploads scraped data to a Pinecone vector store.
There are multiple configuration options available in the Set Inputs node to control how data is chunked, embedded, and stored in Pinecone.
